headline: What to Expect From Xylem’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
summary: Xylem is scheduled to announce its fiscal first-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts project a low single-digit profit rise.

raw.headline: What to Expect From Xylem’s Next Quarterly Earnings Report
raw.summary: Xylem is scheduled to announce its fiscal first-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts project a low single-digit profit rise.

headline: Stifel Maintains Buy on Xylem, Lowers Price Target to $163
summary: Stifel  analyst Nathan Jones   maintains Xylem (NYSE:XYL) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $175 to $163.
